description: Make the agentic layer REAL - Connect all agent tools to actual backend services via HTTP/SDK clients instead of returning fake data. This is the highest-leverage change: the agentic layer is the platform's moat.
steps: 1. Create packages/agentic/src/clients/http-client.ts - a lightweight fetch-based HTTP client that agent tools use to call real app backends. Must handle auth tokens, base URLs from env vars, timeouts, and graceful fallback when services are unreachable.

2. Rewrite packages/agentic/src/agents/quantmail.agent.ts - quantmail_send tool must call POST /api/emails on the quantmail backend (via http-client). quantmail_read must call GET /api/emails with folder/limit/filter params. Reference apps/quantmail/backend/routes/emails.ts for exact API shape.

3. Rewrite packages/agentic/src/agents/quantchat.agent.ts - quantchat_send must call POST /api/messages on quantchat backend. quantchat_smart_reply must call the AISmartRepliesService endpoint (POST /api/ai/smart-replies). Reference apps/quantchat/backend/services/ai-smart-replies.service.ts.

4. Rewrite packages/agentic/src/agents/quantdrive.agent.ts - quantdrive_upload must use @quant/storage StorageClient to upload via S3-compatible API. quantdrive_organize must call the backend organize endpoint. Reference packages/storage/src/storage-client.ts.

5. Rewrite packages/agentic/src/agents/quantmeet.agent.ts - quantmeet_create_room must call LiveKitGateway.createRoom() and return real room data. quantmeet_summarize must call the AI engine for meeting transcript summarization. Reference apps/quantmeet/backend/services/livekit-gateway.service.ts.

6. Rewrite packages/agentic/src/agents/quantsync.agent.ts - quantsync_create_post must call POST /api/posts on quantsync backend. quantsync_trending must query the search-indexer or use ranking service.

7. Upgrade packages/agentic/src/memory/memory-store.ts - Replace the in-memory Map with a proper vector-search-backed memory using @quant/ai UnifiedAIService.generateEmbedding() for embedding generation and similarity search (cosine similarity over stored embeddings). Keep in-memory fallback for when no provider is configured.

8. Upgrade packages/agentic/src/planning/planner.ts - Replace the keyword-matching planner with an LLM-powered planner that uses @quant/ai AIEngine.infer() to decompose goals into tool-calling plans. Use structured output (JSON mode) to get a list of steps with tool names and parameters.

9. Add comprehensive tests in packages/agentic/src/__tests__/ for the new real agent implementations. Tests should mock the HTTP client and verify correct API calls are made with proper params. Test the LLM planner with mocked AI responses.
10. Ensure all changes pass: pnpm turbo typecheck --filter=@quant/agentic && pnpm turbo test --filter=@quant/agentic && pnpm turbo lint --filter=@quant/agentic
acceptance_criteria: All agent tools make real HTTP/SDK calls instead of returning hardcoded fake data
Memory store supports vector similarity search using real embeddings
Planner uses LLM to decompose goals into executable plans
HTTP client gracefully handles service unavailability (returns error objects, does not crash)
All existing tests still pass plus new tests cover the real implementations
pnpm turbo typecheck passes for the agentic package
findings: All 5 agent tools now make real HTTP calls via injected HttpClient. Memory store supports vector search with cosine similarity (falls back to keyword when no EmbeddingProvider). Planner uses LLM via infer() with structured JSON output (falls back to keyword matching). All agents accept optional HttpClient for testability. 113 tests pass including 8 new test files (http-client, all 5 agents, memory-store, planner). Prettier reformatted files via pre-commit hook. The keyword planner matches multiple tools when a goal contains multiple keywords (e.g. 'send message' matches both 'send' -> email and 'message' -> chat).
